purpose: Determine the MINIMAL generating set of the 43 L7 survivors. Which are redundant? Which are irreducible?

STRUCTURAL_CHANNELS.role: These ARE the ratchet. Without them, no irreversibility.

STRUCTURAL_GATES.role: Generate entanglement, create coherent structure between dissipative steps.

STRUCTURAL_DECOMPOSITIONS.role: The mathematical container. Without density_matrix, nothing computable.

STRUCTURAL_MEASUREMENT.role: Collapse / readout. Bridges quantum to classical.

RELATIVE_MEASURES.description: Relative entropy, mutual information, discord — compare states
RELATIVE_MEASURES.role: Quantify information relationships. MI and discord survive dynamics but are type-blind.

DISTANCE_METRICS.description: Fubini-Study, Bures, HS, trace distance — geometric distances
DISTANCE_METRICS.role: Measure how far states have moved. All type-sensitive. Potentially redundant cluster.

STATE_REPRESENTATIONS.description: Bloch, Stokes, Wigner, Husimi, characteristic function, eigenvalues
STATE_REPRESENTATIONS.role: Different views of the SAME state. High redundancy expected.

COHERENCE_ASYMMETRY.role: Quantify non-classicality. Survive cycling but basis-dependent.

TOPOLOGICAL_GEOMETRIC.role: Geometric/topological probes. Hopf connection survives as oscillating (unique behavior). Chiral measures type-sensitive.

L8_entangling_gate_required.description: L8 constrains the ENGINE to use entangling gates. All legos survive (they're computed on states that result from entangling dynamics).
L8_entangling_gate_required.note: L8 is a PROCESS constraint, not a lego filter. It constrains which structural legos MUST be used (CNOT/CZ/iSWAP), but doesn't eliminate measures.

L9_specific_operator_strength.description: L9 requires specific dephasing strength p*. Legos that are QUALITATIVELY insensitive to p wouldn't distinguish p* from p*+epsilon.
L9_specific_operator_strength.note: Structural operators are strength-insensitive by definition (they ARE the operator at any p). All 24 measurable legos ARE strength-sensitive. So L9 is really a constraint on the structural operators, not the measures.

L10_specific_torus_eta.description: L10 constrains to a specific torus geometry eta. Legos not referencing geometric structure are eta-independent.
L10_specific_torus_eta.note: Only topological/geometric legos (hopf_connection, chiral measures, geometric distances) are eta-sensitive. L10 doesn't KILL them — it SHARPENS them to a specific geometry.

analysis_4_hypothetical_kills.meta_observation: L8/L9/L10 are ENGINE constraints, not LEGO filters. They constrain which structural legos must be active and with what parameters. The 24 measurable legos survive all three — they measure RESULTS of constrained dynamics. The real action of L8+ is selecting which of the 19 structural legos are REQUIRED vs optional.

final_minimal_set.key_insight: The 19 structural legos are ALL irreducible — they are operators, not measurements. Among the 24 measurable legos, redundancy clusters reveal which are just different views of the same information. The minimal generating set needs ONE representative from each cluster plus all standalone measures.
